title: Advanced ChatGPT
description: Master advanced conversational AI workflows. Learn how to use custom instructions, manage complex context windows, leverage data analysis tools, and integrate AI into your professional workflows.

seo_metadata.title: Advanced ChatGPT Certificate Course | ProCerix
seo_metadata.description: Take your AI skills to the next level. Master advanced ChatGPT workflows, custom instructions, and data analysis.

learning_outcomes: Utilize Custom Instructions and System Prompts effectively
Manage long conversations without losing context
Use Advanced Data Analysis (formerly Code Interpreter) for data tasks
Chain multiple prompts to solve complex, multi-step problems
Format output into tables, code blocks, and specific document types

modules.title: Context and System Control
modules.description: Taking control of how the AI behaves.

lessons.title: Custom Instructions
lessons.content:
Setting the Baseline

Custom Instructions allow you to set persistent preferences. You can tell the AI who you are, what your goals are, and how you want it to respond across all conversations, saving you from repeating yourself.

lessons.title: Managing Context Windows
lessons.content:
Avoiding Amnesia

LLMs have a finite 'context window' (the amount of text they can remember in one go). Learn techniques for summarizing past conversations and injecting them back into the prompt to maintain continuity in long projects.

modules.title: Advanced Data Analysis
modules.description: Using ChatGPT as a data scientist.

lessons.title: Uploading and Analyzing Data
lessons.content:
Beyond Text

With Advanced Data Analysis, you can upload CSV or Excel files. ChatGPT writes and executes Python code in the background to analyze the data, clean it, and generate insights.

lessons.title: Visualizing Data
lessons.content:
Creating Charts

You can ask the AI to generate charts (bar, line, scatter) based on the uploaded data. It uses libraries like Matplotlib to render these images directly in the chat.

lessons.title: Multi-Step Workflows
lessons.content:
Prompt Chaining

Instead of asking for a final product in one prompt, break the task down. Ask for an outline, approve it, ask for section one, approve it, etc. This drastically improves output quality.

lessons.title: Few-Shot Prompting
lessons.content:
Leading by Example

Provide the AI with a few examples of the desired input and output before asking it to perform the task. This 'few-shot' technique significantly increases accuracy for formatting tasks.

mcqs.question: What is the primary purpose of 'Custom Instructions' in ChatGPT?

options.content: To change the visual theme of the website
To set persistent preferences and context across all new conversations
To upload files
To pay for a subscription

mcqs.question: What happens when a conversation exceeds the LLM's 'context window'?

options.content: The AI deletes the account
The AI begins to forget the earliest parts of the conversation
The AI charges an overage fee
The AI automatically summarizes everything

mcqs.question: How does ChatGPT's 'Advanced Data Analysis' feature process uploaded CSV files?

options.content: It opens them in Microsoft Excel
It writes and executes Python code in a secure environment to analyze the data
It just reads the text like a normal prompt
It cannot process CSV files
Linking two accounts together
Breaking a complex task into multiple sequential prompts rather than one massive request
Repeating the same prompt until you get the right answer
Using a physical chain to secure the server
Providing the AI with several examples of inputs and desired outputs before the actual request
Only giving the AI one chance to answer
Using very short prompts
Prompting while drinking espresso

mcqs.question: If you want ChatGPT to output a table, what is the best approach?

options.content: Hope it guesses what you want
Explicitly state 'Format the output as a Markdown table with columns X, Y, and Z'
It is impossible for ChatGPT to output tables
Upload a picture of a table

mcqs.question: Advanced Data Analysis can generate visual charts. What language does it primarily use under the hood to do this?

options.content: Java
Python (specifically Matplotlib/Seaborn)
HTML/CSS

mcqs.question: When working on a very long writing project with ChatGPT, what is a best practice?

options.content: Paste the entire book into one prompt
Ask for an outline first, then generate it section by section in a chain
Only use one-word prompts
Never use the same chat window twice

mcqs.question: Which of the following tasks is Advanced Data Analysis NOT suited for?

options.content: Cleaning a messy CSV file
Generating a scatter plot from financial data
Physically fixing a broken hard drive
Converting an image to grayscale

mcqs.question: What is the benefit of providing 'Constraints' (e.g., 'Do not use adjectives', 'Keep it under 100 words') in advanced prompts?

options.content: It limits the AI's search space, resulting in more precise and predictable outputs
It makes the AI run slower
It guarantees the information is factually true
It breaks the context window
